$comment: Pylon's paying customer accounts. 7 fixtures matching the BLUEPRINT.md flagship list (5) plus 2 additional. MRR figures are notional rounded; renewal dates are realistic. health_score follows internal CS convention (green/yellow/red). All companies are fictional; any resemblance to real entities is unintentional.

accounts.name: Stratosphere Robotics
accounts.notes: Pylon's first-ever paying customer (Q2 2022). Flagship reference logo. Filed PYL-224 for per-rule fire-rate visibility (Q1 2026). Founders know Marcus personally.

accounts.name: Lumen Health
accounts.notes: Reported the GitHub App reinstall bug (PYL-300). Currently mid-SOC-2 audit on their own product; they're using Pylon's audit logs as evidence. Health is yellow because they're asking for Java coverage NOW (PYL-104 won't help; need PYL-501 follow-up). Renewal at risk if Java preview slips Q3.

accounts.name: Kaltsworth Logistics
accounts.notes: Long-tenured, predictable, low-touch. Filed PYL-225 for status-check name customization. Public mid-market parent company; Kaltsworth Logistics is a software subsidiary. Multi-year contract; renewal locked through 2027.

accounts.name: Verdant Energy
accounts.notes: Original GitLab Cloud pilot customer. Found PYL-305 (duplicate comments). Sales (Dave) negotiating Enterprise upgrade contingent on GitLab GA shipping. Likely upgrade trigger: SAML SSO requirement + their CTO wants the audit-log feature.

accounts.name: Arcola Studios
accounts.notes: Reported PYL-302 (bare-except false positives in test fixtures). C# coverage is the gating factor for their broader adoption — heavy game-engine code is C#. Watching Q4 2026 C# preview closely.

accounts.name: Northwall Financial
accounts.notes: Largest single account by ARR. Heavily customizes Beacon — 47 custom rules. Drove the Marketplace request (PYL-100); first publisher of 5 of their custom rules. Subject to bank-grade compliance; SOC 2 Type II audit-log evidence is contractually required Q3 2026. Renata directly owns the relationship.

accounts.name: Patchwork Climate
accounts.notes: Newest cohort. Came in via OSS contribution (their CTO contributed a Beacon rule before they signed). Strong async-correctness use-case — heavy on httpx + asyncio. PYL-104 launch will likely drive Marketplace activity from them.
